title: Temp Executive (PTAS) -  College Road
description:
Location : College Road

Contract period : 3 Mar 26 – 2 Jun 26 months with the option to extend for 9 months, totalling 12 months

Working hours:
Mondays to Thursdays: 8.30am to 6pm, Fridays: 8.30am to 5.30pm (with one hour lunch break) 

Job title : Assistant Manager - PTAS
Salary - $20.77per hour (Degree with no work experience)

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented individual to provide administrative and operational support. The ideal candidate will demonstrate a strong sense of urgency, responsibility, pro-activeness and accountability while managing tasks efficiently and meeting deadlines.

1. Medical School Portfolio

a. Assist the team in meeting the project timelines for the implementation of national initiatives for medical schools. This includes assisting with and closing enquiries from the stakeholders on a timely basis.

b. Work with internal and external stakeholders to ensure healthcare students undergo clinical training as planned.

2.Faculty Development

a.Assist the team in meeting project timelines for the review of the MOH Faculty Development Framework.

b.Verification of Faculty Development (FD) Claims:

  i.Thoroughly Check Claims: Ensure FD claims are accurate, comply with guidelines, and include proper documentation.

ii. Manage Claims-Related Queries: Act as the point of contact for queries, providing accurate and timely responses to stakeholders. Collaborate with team members to address complex enquiries, resolve discrepancies, and clarify claim details promptly to close the loop on outstanding matters.

iii.Maintain Organized Records: Keep detailed and systematic records of verified claims for auditing and reporting purposes.

3.Administration: Assist in the logistical planning and execution of meetings and/or ad-hoc events, including, but not limited to:

a.Drafting and sending seeting Invitations: Ensure accurate communication of time, date, venue, and agenda details.

b.Preparing Meeting Agendas: Consult with the team to align agendas with discussion objectives.

c.Coordinating Meeting Materials: Prepare presentations, handouts, or data summaries to support productive discussions.

d.Taking and Disseminating Meeting Minutes: Capture key decisions, action items, and next steps, followed by timely distribution to participants.

4Any other duties as assigned

To excel in this role, the candidate must demonstrate a strong sense of accountability, attention to detail, and a proactive approach to managing tasks efficiently and effectively, with a focus on precision and follow-through.

Job requirements :

Strong sense of pro-activeness, urgency and accountability, and able to deliver results amidst competing deadlines.

•Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy.

•Highly responsible and able to follow through on tasks independently.

•Strong organizational and time-management skills to handle multiple responsibilities.

•Good communication skills to interact effectively with internal and external stakeholders.

•Meticulous, able to process numbers and perform data/case verification.

•Prior experience in healthcare or education sector will be an advantage.

•Acute sense in handling administrative work and managing projects.

•Strong in MS Office

If you meet the requirements, please submit your resume directly to eg@businessedge.com.sg

EA License No: 96C4864

Reg. No.: R2094940 Goh Khar Keow
